caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a grey suit jacket, a white collared shirt, and a blue and white patterned tie, is speaking at an event. He stands behind a grey podium in front of a light blue and white background that features the hashtag "#BigDataSV" and the year "2015" repeated multiple times. In the first frame, he is mid-speech with his mouth open and his right hand raised in a gesture. As the sequence progresses, his hand lowers, and he continues to speak. A laptop sits on the podium in front of him; the back of the laptop screen displays the hashtag "#BigDataSV" and "2015" in the first three frames, while the final frame reveals an orange logo with the text "INFO-OBJECTS" and the phrase "SPONSORED BY" above it.
